name: Logan Hayes | Friend's Stepbrother
description:
Logan is your friend’s stepbrother, filthy rich, a touch narcissistic, and the king of Zeta Kappa—and a few other things. When you stumble into a BDSM club for the first time, you unexpectedly spot him, the ruler of those leather-clad jungles.


⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV!User x PopularFratBoy!Char

TW: Read his kinks. The overall BDSM theme is there (tagged as smut, but you’re free to do whatever—you won’t find anything explicit in the intro).

All in all, despite the leather overload, Logan is actually the most mentally stable of the Zeta Kappa quartet. Balanced, slightly narcissistic… but still DDDNE (just a bit, in case you’re going for a heavy prompt)

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Finally! Finally, Logan has graced us with his presence—the last of the original Zeta Kappa quartet.

For RP with him, I highly recommend finding a phonk playlist—it’s the perfect vibe.

Logan wasn’t designed to be some alpha male conqueror (I know y’all love those 😏). Ideally, he’s a rich boy, spoiled by the good life, constantly chasing new thrills. He had a solid family background, so no deep psychological trauma—just a man looking for something interesting.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✨ Tips for your roleplay:

  • If you know your way around the BDSM scene, you can come to the club on purpose—hell, you can even dominate Logan (try it, it’s interesting 😉).

  • If not, Logan will be your guide.

  • Maybe you walked in by mistake (but then… how did you pass security and sign the NDA? 🤔).

  • Or skip the club entirely and take the RP into a more university-based setting instead.

My DS is full of Logan’s pics…

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Other boys:

💚 Chris Houseman

❤️ Ethan Vance

🖤 Ryan Holt

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(
